allow: PowerShell(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; \(Get-Command node\).Source)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(120\); $ok = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { docker ps 2>&1 | Out-Null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { $ok = $true; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; if \($ok\) { "docker-ready" } else { "docker-timeout" })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(45\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { docker exec bridgeai-postgres pg_isready -U bridgeai -d bridgeai 2>&1 | Out-Null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "ready"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 })
